name: congraphdb-benchmark
description: Performance benchmark suite for CongraphDB vs industry-standard graph databases

scripts.benchmark: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run
scripts.benchmark:small: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --scale small
scripts.benchmark:medium: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --scale medium
scripts.benchmark:large: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --scale large
scripts.benchmark:v015: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --v015
scripts.benchmark:api: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --v015 --benchmarks api
scripts.benchmark:dml: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --v015 --benchmarks dml
scripts.benchmark:persistence: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --v015 --benchmarks persistence --storage file
scripts.benchmark:statistics: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --v015 --benchmarks statistics
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:generate && node scripts/copy-data.js && mkdocs build
scripts.docs:serve: npm run docs:generate && node scripts/copy-data.js && mkdocs serve -w docs/data
scripts.update:all: node scripts/run-and-update.js --small && node scripts/run-and-update.js --medium && node scripts/run-and-update.js --large
